error_signature: input value is stored nor do I see the value in the event part
title: Input value not available in event for repeated rows
symptom: The user cannot access the selected values from dropdowns in repeated rows, and the event part of the workflow shows empty values.
applies_when: Using repeated rows in a table element
Trying to access select input values
not_this_if: Using a data grid instead of repeated rows
root_cause: In WeWeb, when inputs are placed in repeated elements like collection lists, the values are not automatically tracked. The event context does not populate with input values until the workflow is executed in preview mode.
fix_steps: Ensure you are running the workflow in preview mode
Use variables to track the selected values in your workflow
agent_instruction: Run the workflow in preview mode to access the input values and track them using variables.
